svg.title: Task 0 — Simple web stack for www.foobar.com
svg.desc: Full diagram: user browser, DNS resolution, single server with Nginx, app server, codebase, MySQL, and known issues.

g.text: Receives HTTP requests · serves static files · forwards dynamic requests
Executes business logic · generates dynamic HTML/JSON response
HTML · CSS · JS · backend source code stored on disk
Stores users · posts · orders · all persistent data

svg.text: LAMP stack: Linux · Apache/Nginx · MySQL · PHP/Python/Ruby
